plugin.name: Common animation scripts
plugin.description: Usually you don't need these scripts since most weapon mods already include them. Don't install them if you run G.A.M.M.A., it already has them. Install only if your weapon checks fail with missing animation errors.

plugin.name: Vanilla Anomaly / Custom Modpack
plugin.description: Select this if you play vanilla Anomaly or any non-G.A.M.M.A. modpack. Keeps the default weapon check config that ships with AmmoCheck. Installs no extra files.

plugin.name: G.A.M.M.A. 0.9.5
plugin.description: Select this if you run G.A.M.M.A. 0.9.5. Installs the weapon check animations matched to that modpack version.

plugin.name: G.A.M.M.A. 0.9.4
plugin.description: Select this if you run G.A.M.M.A. 0.9.4. Installs the weapon check animations matched to that modpack version.
